ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the transaction */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the transaction */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost of items sold in the transaction */,
  "items_sold" INTEGER /* Number of items sold in the transaction */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer involved in the transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the store is located */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of items sold */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, return) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the buyer */,
  "preferred_store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer's preferred store */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the buyer registered */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the buyer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase made by the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buyers_preferred_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the store is located */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "store_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "store_email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the store */,
  "last_inventory_check" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region manager */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales for the region */,
  "last_sales_report_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sales report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_region_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of items in the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the item belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the item */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the item */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date the item was last sold */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier (e.g., manufacturer, distributor) */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last order placed with the supplier */,
  "average_delivery_time" INTEGER /* Average delivery time for orders from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the manager (e.g., store manager, region manager) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  "last_performance_evaluation" TEXT /* Date of the last performance evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance record */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the performance record */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales for the period */,
  "total_items_sold" INTEGER /* Total items sold for the period */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average value of orders for the period */,
  "top_selling_item" INTEGER /* ID of the top-selling item for the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_top_selling_item FOREIGN KEY ("top_selling_item") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the item */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the item */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* Estimated next reorder date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store placing the order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier the order is placed with */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the order is expected to be delivered */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, inventory, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view report) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., sales report, inventory report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
